title: Subitem timeline dependency not working
excerpt:
I have exhausted all my options before posting: 
When I establish dependency and link it to timeline for subitems - it does not auto pushback if I start moving tasks. This is not the case for regular items - as it works …

posts.author: zenh (carl)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have exhausted all my options before posting:

When I establish dependency and link it to timeline for subitems - it does not auto pushback if I start moving tasks. This is not the case for regular items - as it works as expected.

Am I missing something here

posts.author: AGTHK (Andreas Greven)
posts.cookedHtml: Same here. Please give us a feedback when this will be fixed!

posts.author: PEC (Pierre-Emmanuel Caux)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Can we please get a feedback on this issue? Last comment was 4 months ago and I cannot find any answer.
I get to set dependencies between my sub-items, change the dependency setting to Timeline, but nothing happens whenever I shift the dates.
